# Add Filtering, Search & Multi-Select Controls

Improve list views with filters, multi-select option boxes, and search for centers/groups/instructors/students.

## Tasks

- Implement `OptionsBox`/dropdowns and multi-select components.
- Add server-side filtering support and GraphQL query arguments.
- Integrate client-side search and debounced requests for large lists.

## Rationale

Filtering and search improve usability when data volumes grow.

Suggested labels: frontend
